pr.title: [WIP] Update workflow to handle synchronization issues during commits
pr.body:
- [x] Investigate the failing "Convert JPEG Images to WebP" workflow logs and current workflow definition
- [ ] Identify the images and markdown references involved in the failed conversion run
- [ ] Update `.github/workflows/convert-images-to-webp.yml` to rebase before pushing
- [ ] Re-run the image conversion for the affected images and verify repository changes
- [ ] Run targeted validation for the workflow change and converted assets
- [ ] Run CodeQL review and finalize the fix

<!-- START COPILOT ORIGINAL PROMPT -->



<details>

<summary>Original prompt</summary>

> The workflow "Convert JPEG Images to WebP" failed because of a rejected push due to an out-of-date `master` branch. To resolve this, update the workflow file `.github/workflows/convert-images-to-webp.yml`. Modify the "Commit and push changes" step to handle synchronization issues by adding a `git pull --rebase` before the `git push` command. Here is an outline of the change:
> 
> ```yaml
> - name: Commit and push changes
>   run: |
>     git config --local user.email "action@github.com"
>     git config --local user.name "GitHub Action"
>     git add -A
>     if git diff --cached --exit-code; then
>       echo "No changes to commit"
>     else
>       git commit -m "Convert JPEG images to WebP and update markdown references"
>       git pull --rebase
>       git push
>     fi
> ```
> 
> Additionally, rerun the image conversion process for the images involved in the failed job. Ensure the new `.webp` files replace the existing `.jpeg` files and update the repository with these changes.
> 
> The following is the prior conversation context from the user's chat exploration (may be truncated):
> 
> User: Please find a solution for this failing job. Use the logs, job definition, and any referenced files where the failure occurred. Keep your response focused on the solution and include code suggestions when appropriate.
> 
> Assistant: The workflow failed during the "Commit and push changes" step because the push was rejected due to an out-of-date branch. This happened because the workflow didn't pull recent changes from the remote repository before attempting to push.
> 
> ### Root Cause
> When multiple processes or users push changes to the branch `master`, the remote repository may contain updates not present in the local branch. This leads to a rejected push.
> 
> ### Solution
> Modify the workflow to integrate remote changes before pushing. Use `git pull` to synchronize the local branch with the remote branch.
> 
> ### Recommended Code Fix
> Update the "Commit and push changes" step in `.github/workflows/convert-images-to-webp.yml` to handle this scenario:
> 
> ```yaml
> - name: Commit and push changes
>   run: |
>     git config --local user.email "action@github.com"
>     git config --local user.name "GitHub Action"
>     git add -A
>     if git diff --cached --exit-code; then
>       echo "No changes to commit"
>     else
>       git commit -m "Convert JPEG images to WebP and update markdown references"
>       git pull --rebase
>       git push
>     fi
> ```
> 
> ### Explanation of Changes
> 1. **`git pull --rebase`**:
>    This pulls changes from the remote repository and rebases the local changes on top of the new base. It avoids creating a merge commit.
> 
> 2. **Safe Updates**:
>    This ensures that the local branch is up-to-date before pushing, reducing the likelihood of conflicts.
> 
> Apply this fix, and the workflow should function as expected. If additional setup is needed, test locally or in a temporary GitHub environment to verify correctness.
> 
> User: 日本語で回答して
> 
> Assistant: GitHub Actionsにおけるジョブの失敗原因は、「Commit and push changes」ステップでリモートリポジトリへのプッシュが拒否されたためです。  
> 理由としては、リモートリポジトリがローカルブランチよりも先行しており、アップデートの同期が行われていない（ローカルの`master`が古い）ためです。
> 
> ---
> 
> ### 解決策
> この問題を解決するには、プッシュ前にリモートリポジトリの変更を取り込むようにワークフローを修正します。具体的には、`git pull`を使用してリモート変更をローカルに統合します。
> 
> 修正後の`.github/workflows/convert-images-to-webp.yml`ファイルの該当ステップは以下のようになります：
> 
> ```yaml
> - name: Commit and push changes
>   run: |
>     git config --local user.email "action@github.com"
>     git config --local user.name "GitHub Action"
>     git add -A
>     if git diff --cached --exit-code; then
>       echo "No changes to commit"
>     else
>       git commit -m "Convert JPEG images to WebP and update markdown references"
>       git pull --rebase
>       git push
>     fi
> ```
> 
> ---
> 
> ### 修正のポイント
> 1. **`git pull --rebase`の追加**  
>    リモートリポジトリの変更をローカルに反映した上で、ローカルの変更を上位にリベースします。これにより、不要なマージコミットを避けられます。
> 
> 2. **競合の防止**  
>    プッシュ前に最新のリモート状態と同期を取ることで、変更が拒否される問題を防ぎます。
> 
> ---
> 
> この修正でジョブが正しく動作するはずです。一度適用してワークフローの挙動を確認してください。
> 
> User: 修正のプルリクを作成と今あげた画像のコンバートをやり直すことをしたい
> 
> Assistant: プルリクエストの作成と画像の再コンバートを行う準備を進めています。少々お待ちください。
> 
> 


</details>



<!-- START COPILOT CODING AGENT SUFFIX -->

*This pull request was created from Copilot chat.*
>
